quote_text: Deutsche Bank reviewed with the board the status of negotiations with Ingredion, as well as the due diligence process. Deutsche Bank advised the board that Ingredion had indicated verbally that it could increase its price from $18.00 per share into the range of $18.25 to $18.50 per share.
